candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term debt/current portion; however it includes leases via the current portion line in this dataset.
Captures short-term borrowings but misses current maturities of long-term debt.
Useful component for current maturities of non-lease long-term debt; does not capture all short-term debt by itself.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a minimal non-lease set for baseline STD: short-term borrowings plus current portion of long-term debt excluding capitalized leases. Avoided 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' because it appears to include lease current portions. Second selected label is outside shortlist but matches the required non-lease definition confidently.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable label on the balance sheet, but values shown are blank in preview and existence may vary by year.

Deferred tax liability is non-current and not taxes payable.

candidates.row_label: Deferred Tax & Investment Tax Credits - Long-Term
candidates.why: Deferred/non-current taxes, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected exact current taxes payable label. Blank recent preview values do not invalidate the row.
